title: First-Line Tislelizumab Plus Chemotherapy for Recurrent or Metastatic Nasopharyngeal Cancer: Three-Year Follow-Up of the Phase 3 RATIONALE-309 Randomized Clinical Trial.
abstract: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) is a major health concern in Asia, and treatment options for recurrent or metastatic disease are limited. Immunotherapy plus chemotherapy has shown promise, but long-term data are needed to guide first-line treatment.
